case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,486.00 U.S.

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,486.00 U.S. CURRENCY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF OF RAYMOND FONG REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,486.00 U.S. CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
